text_a: Administer 10mg of metformin twice daily with meals.
text_b: Administer 100mg of metformin twice daily with meals.

text_a: This medication is contraindicated in patients with renal impairment.
text_b: This medication is recommended for patients with renal impairment.

text_a: Take one tablet daily in the morning with a glass of water.
text_b: Take one tablet each morning with water.

text_a: Do not exceed 4000mg of acetaminophen in 24 hours.
text_b: Maximum daily dose of acetaminophen is 4 grams.

text_a: Discontinue use immediately if signs of allergic reaction appear.
text_b: Continue use even if mild allergic symptoms develop; consult physician if symptoms persist.
Administer via intravenous infusion over a 30-minute period.

text_a: Not recommended for use during pregnancy.
text_b: Safe for use during all trimesters of pregnancy.
